title: Notifications -  Device updating
scenario: DFU notification "Device software is updating..." appears and tapping it opens the app to the Software Update screen with progress bar
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app and connect to a Poly Bluetooth audio device.
2. Initiate a Device Firmware Update (DFU) from the app (e.g., via Home → Device Settings → Software Update).
3. Observe the notification area on the device for the message "Device software is updating...".
4. Press the Home button or switch to another app to send the Poly Studio Mobile app to the background.
5. Tap the "Device software is updating..." notification from the notification shade.
expected: The notification "Device software is updating..." appears when the DFU begins. Tapping the notification while the app is in the background brings the Poly Studio Mobile app to the foreground and opens the Software Update screen showing the DFU progress bar.
